cases.input: Design a plugin QA orchestrator agent with three skills, Read/Grep/Bash tools, two command flows, and maxTurns rationale.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a bounded agent design spec with valid frontmatter, skills, flows, operating principles, maxTurns calculation, validation, and risks.

cases.input: Design a read-only audit agent with disallowed Write/Edit tools and no installation behavior.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses either tools or disallowedTools, documents role boundary, and validates flow coverage.

cases.input: Design an agent with PreToolUse hooks in frontmatter.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks `hooks` because plugin subagents cannot define lifecycle hooks.

cases.input: Design an agent that declares mcpServers and permissionMode.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects forbidden plugin subagent fields and routes MCP/permission needs to session-level configuration notes.

cases.input: Design frontmatter with both tools and disallowedTools.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks the spec because the fields are mutually exclusive.

cases.input: Design an agent with five skills but maxTurns set to 5.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires formula-based maxTurns and blocks undersized values.

cases.input: Use operating principles like be helpful and ensure quality.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects generic principles and requires specific, actionable, verifiable rules.

cases.input: Design an agent that handles two commands but documents only one flow.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks until every handled command has an execution flow and gate behavior.

cases.input: Ask the coding agent to fix a failing unit test.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because no plugin agent design is requested.

quality_criteria: tools and disallowedTools are mutually exclusive
operating principles are specific and verifiable
